title: Mountain Bike Rear Shock 120mm/125mm/150mm/165mm/185mm/190mm/200mm,Bicycle Back Shock Absorber- Hydraulic Rear Suspension Shock for Mtb/Mt/ebike/Dmn/Electric scooter.
features: Application: MTB Rear Shock, suitable for mountain bike, electric bike,Mtn,e bike,Dmn,scooter,bmx,road/gravel and other bike modification.
Product Specifications: Eye to Eye/Shock distance:120x15mm/125x15mm/150x25mm/165x40mm/185x45mm/190x50mm/200x60mm ； Load:550lbs,750lbs,1000lbs,Bushing Size: 8mm x 24mm.

Performance: Bicycle rear shock absorber, the shock absorption is controlled by the oil pressure spring system, the shock absorption is soft, more stable, and the service life is long; It has the same shock absorption effect as air pressure shock absorption, and the cost is relatively low.

How to choose right bike back shock specification：1.First, check the distance between the mounting holes,Whether it can be installed or not.2.Check your weight,Choose the shock absorption effect that suits you.3.Depending on the road you ride,Choose the best spec for your ride.（Pictures described in detail）

Note: The greater the weight (pounds) of the rear shock on the bike, the greater the pressure required. Please measure the size of the hydraulic shock absorber and your own riding comfort weight to match before purchasing. If you have any questions, please let us know and we will give you a satisfactory answer.
